name: This is our first box ..of pizza!
bio: This is a simple website that updates automatically when you change the JSON content.
tooltip: This is the exited/happy man image!

name: This is our second box
bio: Edit the content/pages.json file to update this website. When you commit and push, GitHub Actions will automatically rebuild and deploy the site.
tooltip: This is the thinking person image!
contentTooltip: This tooltip appears when you hover over the text content!

name: Confused Man
bio: This section features a screenshot image. The image is stored in the images/ folder and referenced with a relative path.
tooltip: This is your screenshot! Images in the images/ folder are automatically available on GitHub Pages.
